case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. ZHISHI CHEN

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO CCP 664.6 THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION TO RE-OPEN AND ENTER JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100010618) AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ZHISHI
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $528.90 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 100030138) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEN, ZHISHI $4,367.29 PRINCIPAL, $528.90 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,896.19, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 100038525) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ZHISHI
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-07-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-07-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFFS COUNSEL RE: DEFAULT UNDER STIPULATION (TRANSACTION ID # 100030138) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 16038012), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED FEB-01-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ZHISHI
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, ZHISHI SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-11-2016
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100010618) (TRANSACTION ID # 100010618) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEN, ZHISHI
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT /CONDITIONAL (TRANSACTION ID # 100010618) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC
